channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Dell Coupon Codes: 20% Off for May 2026
item.description: Get 20% off with verified Dell promo code, plus today’s coupons for up to $600 off laptops, Alienware monitors, and all things tech.

item.title: LG Promo Codes and Coupons for May 2026
item.description: Save 20% with an LG promo code today, plus up to $1,000 off appliances, 40% off bestselling TVs and monitors.

item.title: NordVPN Coupons and Deals: 77% Off in May 2026
item.description: Save up to 77% on 2-year plans and get 3 free months with our NordVPN discount codes.

item.title: Herman Miller Promo Code & Discounts: Save up to 40% in May 2026
item.description: Whether you’re looking for a Herman Miller promo code or discounts in their sale, here is how to save on the world's best ergonomic office furniture this month.

item.title: Sony Coupons: 45% Off Sony Headphones, WF-1000XM6 Earbuds, and Sony Cameras for May
item.description: Upgrade your setup with Sony’s newest releases. Save on industry-leading noise-canceling audio, and pro-level Alpha cameras.

item.title: Stearns and Foster Promo Codes: $300 Off in May
item.description: Discover the best Stearns and Foster promo codes, discounts, and deals to elevate your sleep experience with premium comfort and quality.

item.title: 30% VistaPrint Coupon & Promo Codes | May 2026
item.description: From personalized gifts to business essentials, WIRED can help you save with our selection of VistaPrint promo codes.

item.title: Kickstarter rolls back its mature content policy after outcry
item.description: Kickstarter is going back to its previous rules around mature content after creators criticized the new policy it introduced last week.

item.title: Mercedes’ electric AMG GT 4-door coupe can go 0-60 in 2 seconds
item.description: The era of ultra-high performance Mercedes EVs is here. The German automaker finally revealed its new super sedan, the AMG GT 4-door coupe, with technology borrowed from the automaker's XX concept that last year made history by driving 24,901 miles in under 8 days at Nardò Ring in southern Italy. With the production model, Mercedes […]

item.title: Google’s new Gemini Omni AI can turn almost anything into video
item.description: Google has introduced Gemini Omni Flash, a new AI model focused on creating and editing video through conversation

item.title: 1 169 ch, une recharge en 11 minutes et un faux V8 : la première AMG électrique est un véritable monstre
item.description: Ça y est : voici la première voiture électrique siglée AMG. La Mercedes-AMG GT Coupé 4 Portes (son nom complet) veut pourtant être une sportive d'exception avec trois moteurs à flux axiaux développant quasiment 1 200 ch, une batterie inspirée de la Formule 1, une recharge en 11 minutes et un son de V8 plus vrai que nature. Suffisant pour convaincre ? ...
